generated_oml:
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring ambient temperature in the incubator system range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature 1 in the incubator system range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature 2 in the incubator system range -55°C to +125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element for thermal incubator system, 214×214×3 mm"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan for thermal incubator system, airflow 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Printed Circuit Board with MOSFETs and optocouplers for controlling heatbed and fan"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive temperature insights from simulation models for control adjustments without direct physical action"
]

instance CalibratedModel : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters used for accurate temperature prediction"
]

instance RealTimeTemperatureMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of temperature measurements from all sensors"
]

instance CodeVersioning : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version-controlled code and specifications for digital twin development"
]

instance TemperatureControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control action to activate heatbed or fan based on temperature thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides temperature prediction using dynamic thermal models (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModel
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time temperature measurements from all sensors"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTemperatureMonitoring
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Regulates temperature via bang-bang control based on thresholds LL, UL and timing parameters H, C"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureControlAction
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages code and specifications via open-source repository"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersioning
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for communication between physical sensors and virtual twin handles real-time temperature data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python package for non-linear least squares optimization, simulation, and control algorithm execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, SimulationService, BangBangControlService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source repository for code and specifications of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature measurement data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQ, Scipy
]

instance InternalTemperature1Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature 1 measurement data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQ, Scipy
]

instance InternalTemperature2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature 2 measurement data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQ, Scipy
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system consisting of styrofoam insulated box (0.03 m³ volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s), three DS18S20 temperature sensors (one ambient, two internal), Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, AmbientTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, RaspberryPi4, PCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) generated by the DT's controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates physical components through MOSFETs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT components and DT services as per Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; DT integrated into deployed physical system for monitoring and control during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions tested via experiments (e.g., temperature uniformity with three sensors); Model B validated as better for thermal inertia prediction; calibration minimizes residual error using least-squares optimization; uncertainty addressed through empirical validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ communication protocol between DT components and PT; Raspberry Pi GPIO with PCB (MOSFETs, optocouplers) for sensor/actuator interfacing."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT software components deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; all components hosted on-premises within the physical system."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; optocouplers used for electrical isolation between control signals and high-current components to prevent hazards."
]
